infrastructure: conda-forge fe_gpu env (glibc-2.17 compatible, CUDA 11.8) runs on g-nodes; ~50x faster than CPU

soft_mode_transfer.verdict: marginal; Born charges do not encode the lattice instability direction

born_route_Ps.verdict: linear Z*(parent).u breaks down for large polar distortions; needs path-integrated Z*

conclusion: GPU works; Born-charge head excellent; soft-mode discovery head needs phonon force-constant/eigenvector training data (not exposed in MP phonon summary)
